caption: The video captures a scene from "Sim Week," a simulation week designed to help surgical interns transition into residency. In the frames, a group of medical professionals, dressed in pink scrubs and surgical caps, are gathered around a patient lying on a hospital bed. The setting appears to be a clinical or training environment, with various medical equipment and supplies visible in the background. The team is actively engaged in a simulated medical procedure, with some members closely examining the patient while others assist with instruments and monitoring devices. The atmosphere suggests a focused and collaborative effort, emphasizing the importance of hands-on training and teamwork in preparing future surgeons for real-world scenarios. The text overlay reinforces the educational context, highlighting the program's aim to provide a realistic glimpse into the life of a surgical intern.
